titles.text: ブロックくずし デデンの逆襲

descriptions.text: Classic puzzle "Breakout" appeared in PS. Simple rule to go break it hit a ball into a set of blocks on the screen control a paddle at the bottom of the screen is intact, items of more than 20 kinds will liven up the game. In addition to the story mode character of five an outstanding performance, it is equipped with a large number of mode to save the princess.
